interfaces.name: BreadcrumbItem

components.name: AccordionComponent
components.description:
Accordion item with a clickable header that expands/collapses a content slot.

  • Default — white header when collapsed, offwhite when expanded
  • Disabled — non-interactive, greyed out

Use <ng-content> to project any content into the expanded body.
components.rawdescription:
Accordion item with a clickable header that expands/collapses a content slot.

- **Default** — white header when collapsed, offwhite when expanded
- **Disabled** — non-interactive, greyed out

Use `<ng-content>` to project any content into the expanded body.

inputsClass.name: tooltipSide
inputsClass.rawdescription: Side the tooltip appears on hover (M and S only)
inputsClass.description: Side the tooltip appears on hover (M and S only)

components.description:
Square Tab component — icon-based navigation tab used in vertical tab rails.

Supports three sizes (L, M, S) and four statuses (Default, Active, Hover, Disabled). Hover and Active states are driven interactively via mouse events. Size L shows an optional text label beneath the icon. Sizes M and S show a Tooltip automatically on hover.
components.rawdescription:
Square Tab component — icon-based navigation tab used in vertical tab rails.

Supports three sizes (L, M, S) and four statuses (Default, Active, Hover, Disabled).
Hover and Active states are driven interactively via mouse events.
Size L shows an optional text label beneath the icon.
Sizes M and S show a Tooltip automatically on hover.

getSignature.name: tooltipArrowSide
getSignature.rawdescription: Arrow side for the Tooltip: opposite of tooltipSide so it points toward the tab
getSignature.description: Arrow side for the Tooltip: opposite of tooltipSide so it points toward the tab

components.templateData: @if (size === 'L' && showLabel) { {{ label }} } @if (showTooltip) { }

components.description:
Title Bar component — top-level page header with configurable left and right sections.

Left side: back button, menu button, breadcrumb trail, title, edit button, tag badge Right side: published toggle (with optional calibrated tag), save icon, text/primary/secondary action buttons

Both White and Transparent background types are supported.
components.rawdescription:
Title Bar component — top-level page header with configurable left and right sections.

**Left side:** back button, menu button, breadcrumb trail, title, edit button, tag badge
**Right side:** published toggle (with optional calibrated tag), save icon, text/primary/secondary action buttons

Both `White` and `Transparent` background types are supported.

components.name: ToleranceLegendComponent

inputsClass.name: withIndicator
inputsClass.rawdescription: Show the current-value indicator on the bar
inputsClass.description: Show the current-value indicator on the bar

components.description:
Tolerance Legend — colour-coded tolerance bar with optional indicator and tooltip.

Property Description
symmetric 5 segments: red · yellow · green · yellow · red (200 px)
asymmetric 3 segments: green · yellow · red (120 px)

The indicator marks the current value on the bar. Hovering the bar shows the tooltip with a slide-in animation (arrowSide=Bottom).
components.rawdescription:
Tolerance Legend — colour-coded tolerance bar with optional indicator and tooltip.

| Property | Description |
|---|---|
| **symmetric** | 5 segments: red · yellow · green · yellow · red (200 px) |
| **asymmetric** | 3 segments: green · yellow · red (120 px) |

The indicator marks the current value on the bar.
Hovering the bar shows the tooltip with a slide-in animation (arrowSide=Bottom).
components.templateData:

}
@if (isSymmetric) {
} @if (isAsymmetric) {
}
@if (withIndicator) {
}
@if (isSymmetric) { -2 -1 -0.9 0.9 1 2 } @if (isAsymmetric) { 0.9 1 }

components.name: TooltipComponent

inputsClass.name: arrowSide
inputsClass.rawdescription: Which side the arrow appears on

components.description:
Tooltip component with three visual styles and four arrow positions.

The arrow is a pure CSS triangle (16 × 8px per Figma spec, rotated for direction).

  • Style — Neutral (offwhite), Alert (yellow), Success (green)
  • Arrow side — Top, Right, Bottom, Left
components.rawdescription:
Tooltip component with three visual styles and four arrow positions.

The arrow is a pure CSS triangle (16 × 8px per Figma spec, rotated for direction).

- **Style** — `Neutral` (offwhite), `Alert` (yellow), `Success` (green)
- **Arrow side** — `Top`, `Right`, `Bottom`, `Left`
components.templateData: @if (showSmallLabel && smallLabel) { {{ smallLabel }} } @if (showHeading && heading) { {{ heading }} } @if (showMessage && message) { {{ message }} }

components.name: UiButtonComponent
components.description:
Button component — three types, three sizes, four interactive states.

  • Primary — filled red background, white text
  • Secondary — white background, red border and text
  • Text — no background or border, red text

Sizes: Small (32px), Medium (40px), Large (56px). Hover and Active states are driven by CSS :hover / :active. Optional left and right icons flank the label.
components.rawdescription:
Button component — three types, three sizes, four interactive states.

- **Primary** — filled red background, white text
- **Secondary** — white background, red border and text
- **Text** — no background or border, red text

Sizes: Small (32px), Medium (40px), Large (56px).
Hover and Active states are driven by CSS `:hover` / `:active`.
Optional left and right icons flank the label.
